positive: A highly detailed, vintage scientific diagram illustration of an imaginary creature (a 'Cloud Leviathan'). The artwork should mimic the style of 19th-century natural history plates, using fine cross-hatching, sepia tones, and meticulous labels (without actual text). Engraving style, scientific illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern art, bright colors, cartoon
